check.if: any aspect routes to web-search-researcher AND INTERACTIVE
check.ask: Name the aspect(s) needing web research. Ask the user to approve dispatching web-search-researcher, recommended option first. If declined, drop those aspects and record them as deferred gaps for the Open Questions section.

check.if: any aspect routes to web-search-researcher AND AUTONOMOUS
check.action:
If web_search_approved is true, keep the web aspects. If false or absent, emit to stdout and stop:
CLARIFICATION_NEEDED: Study requires web research for {aspect(s)}, but web_search_approved was not set. Re-dispatch with web_search_approved=true, or narrow to internal sources.

substep.title: Dispatch the Wave
substep.action: A single-domain study is one wave. Dispatch all aspect prompts via the Task tool in a SINGLE message (parallel). Compose each prompt per child-subagent-dispatch prompt-anatomy — the aspect question alone, never the parent task's intent.

substep.title: Validate Returns and Sharpen-Redispatch
substep.action: Redispatch any vague return with a sharper prompt before synthesis. A "no matches" return is a negative finding, not a vague one — keep it; it becomes a cited finding in step 3. Collect the raw findings per aspect.
